module: ABS 5 / ASC 5 — Anti-lock braking / stability control
note: Keyed on exact German ORTTEXT from the abs5 SGBD FORTTEXTE table, variant-agnostic.

faults.ABS Ventil Auslass hinten links oder Hin: ABS valve, outlet rear left or rear axle
faults.ABS Ventil Einlass hinten links oder Hin: ABS valve, inlet rear left or rear axle
faults.Falsches Zahnrad an einem der 4 Raeder: Incorrect pulse-wheel gear on one of the 4 wheels
faults.Versorgungssp. Drehzahlf. (aktive DF), S: Supply voltage, wheel-speed sensor (active sensor); control unit fault (passive sensor)
